description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional sofa with a chaise lounge on the right side, upholstered in a light gray fabric. The sofa features three large, rectangular back cushions and a single, continuous seat cushion that extends into the chaise. The armrests are wide, slightly flared, and padded, providing a comfortable resting area. The upholstery appears smooth with subtle piping along the edges, adding a refined touch to the overall design. The sofa sits on small, barely visible legs, giving it a low-profile appearance. Its clean lines and neutral color make it suitable for contemporary urban environments such as apartment lobbies, waiting areas, or outdoor covered patios.
description: A modern L-shaped sectional sofa in light gray fabric with wide padded armrests, three back cushions, and a chaise lounge. The design is sleek, low-profile, and suitable for contemporary urban settings.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the L-shape, three back cushions, wide armrests, and the chaise lounge extending to the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sofa's depth, the thickness of the armrest, and the profile of the back cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous back panel and the subtle seam dividing the main sofa from the chaise section.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the chaise lounge's length, the armrest's width, and the arrangement of the back cushions.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, attached back cushions and a single continuous seat cushion with an extended chaise; all cushions are uniform in size and shape.
attribute_armrest_style: Wide, padded armrests with a slightly flared profile, matching the sofa's height and featuring subtle piping along the edges.
attribute_leg_design: Small, recessed legs barely visible from most angles, likely made of dark plastic or metal, positioned at the corners and under the chaise for support.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest with three segmented, attached cushions; no tufting or channeling, smooth and uniform in appearance.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light gray fabric with a smooth texture and subtle piping detail; no visible patterns or decorative stitching.
